question_groups.instruction: Choose TRUE if the statement agrees with the information given in the text, choose FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, or choose NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.

items.prompt_html: Dr Engel has spent ten years gathering evidence for the notion that animals treat their own illnesses.
Animal behaviourists have always believed that animals know how to heal themselves.
Dr Karesh enlisted the help of a medical team during his research.
Wild animals taken into captivity tend to experience a decline in health.

options.label: TRUE
options.text: if the statement agrees with the information

options.label: FALSE
options.text: if the statement contradicts the information

options.label: NOT GIVEN
options.text: if there is no information on this

question_groups.prompt_html:
Complete the table below.

ResearchersSubjectsSelf-treatmentFindingsOther observations
Micheal Huffman & Mohamedi Seifu 1987Chimps with wormsEat <blank data-qid="q5"/> of Veronia plantPlant contains toxins known as <blank data-qid="q6"/> that kill parasites.Remedy also used by people

Richard WranghamChimps with gut parasitesEat Aspilia leavesUndigested leaves wrongly believed to contain a <blank data-qid="q8"/>Chimps indicate leaves have an <blank data-qid="q9"/> taste

question_groups.instruction:
Complete the summary below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
question_groups.prompt_html:
Write ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.

Soil as medication

The consumption of soil for medicinal reasons is called <blank data-qid="q10"/>.Initially, people believed that animals ate dirt to get <blank data-qid="q11"/> and other minerals. They then realised that the soil eaten in some areas did not contain a lot of minerals, and that in other areas plants were a better mineral source. Many people believe that the clay in soil can <blank data-qid="q12"/> poisons. Indeed, clay- based <blank data-qid="q13"/> are sold in African markets to treat a range of illnesses.

options.label: i

options.label: ii

options.label: v

options.label: vi

options.text: Some occupations involve little or no interesting conversation

options.label: viii

options.label: ix

question_groups.instruction:

items.prompt_html: Interacting socially is preferable to hurrying through a transaction.
People whose conversations are mainly of a personal and meaningful nature are more satisfied with their lives.
There is more than one species whose members communicate for social reasons.
Some people find it easier than others to change the subject of a conversation.

options.label: C

options.label: D

items.prompt_html: Which aspect of American business was admired?

options.label: A

options.label: B
options.text: the variety of products available

options.label: C
options.text: the methods of increasing productivity

options.label: D

items.prompt_html: The continuous working week was intended to ensure that

options.label: A

options.label: B
options.text: machinery was in continuous use.

options.label: C
options.text: workers had more days off.

options.label: D
options.text: factories could afford to buy efficient machines.

options.label: B

options.label: C

options.label: D
